title: Cybersecurity Incident Response Plan
scenario: Create a comprehensive cybersecurity incident response plan for a large enterprise, including procedures for detecting, containing, and mitigating potential security breaches. The plan should address potential risks and vulnerabilities, as well as implementation and maintenance requirements. The target output should be a detailed, 7-page document with clear headings, concise paragraphs, and numbered lists.
constraints: Must include at least 10 different cybersecurity protocols
Must be written from the perspective of a chief information security officer

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated plan adheres to the specified constraints and format.
The plan covers all required cybersecurity protocols for the enterprise.
The plan is easy to understand and free of unnecessary information.
The plan is properly formatted and structured using a standard cybersecurity incident response plan template.
